payload.title: LIST OF COMPETITIVE PROCUREMENTS FOR BOARD APPROVAL
payload.description: December 2023 list of competitive procurements requiring MTA Board approval, including personal service contracts and modifications to existing contracts.

tool_args.label: FSA Program Net-Zero Cost to MTA

payload.claim_text: The program's costs are offset by approximately $932,000 per year in savings due to reductions to the employer portion of FICA taxes that otherwise would be owed on wages, resulting in a net-zero cost to the MTA for this service.
payload.subject: MTA Flexible Spending Account program
payload.description: FSA program has net-zero cost to MTA because PPPM fees offset by employer FICA tax savings

payload.claim_text: The SC unanimously determined that P&A's proposal provided the best value to the MTA.
payload.subject: Selection Committee
payload.description: Selection Committee unanimously determined P&A's proposal provided best value

payload.claim_text: The Request for Proposals was publicly advertised in July 2023 and letters advising potential proposers of its availability were mailed to 10 firms. Proposals were received from three firms: P&A; PayFlex; and TASC.
payload.subject: MTA FSA contract RFP
payload.description: RFP was publicly advertised in July 2023, mailed to 10 firms, three proposals received

payload.claim_text: P&A has been satisfactorily providing administrative and record-keeping services for MTA's FSA accounts for 14 years.
payload.subject: P&A Administrative Services
payload.description: P&A has satisfactorily serviced MTA FSA accounts for 14 years

payload.claim_text: Greystone currently provides tenant lease compliance enforcement and tenant rent collection/accounting services for all tenants managed by MTA Real Estate. Greystone also provides (1) transaction management services which include acquisitions in support of the Capital Program and leasing of retail and non-retail property to generate non-farebox revenue; (2) a New York State Code Enforcement Official... (3) dispute resolution management of collections matters and biweekly reporting on all legal matters.
payload.subject: Greystone Select Incorporated
payload.description: Greystone provides tenant management, transaction management, code enforcement, and dispute resolution services for MTA Real Estate

tool_args.label: Caremark Extension Needed for RFP Completion

payload.claim_text: This request for an extension through December 31, 2024, is required for additional time to finalize the procurement, which began in March 2023, and is currently in step two of the RFP process.
payload.subject: Caremark/CVS Health contract extension
payload.description: Extension required to finalize successor procurement that began in March 2023

tool_args.label: Greystone FTE for Penn Station Liaison

payload.claim_text: Under this Supplemental Agreement, the FTE will replace the Project Manager currently engaged by MTA Construction and Development to act as a liaison between the (1) the Penn Station master tenant and its subtenants; and (2) MTA C&D's External Partner Program and code approval officials: Long Island Rail Road and Amtrak.
payload.subject: Greystone FTE replacement
payload.description: New FTE replaces MTA C&D Project Manager as liaison between Penn Station master tenant, subtenants, and MTA C&D External Partner Program
